sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85189" key="polupiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῠπῐκός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n85189.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for a polypus,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σπαθίον π.</foreign> knife <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for removing polypi,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:46:6:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46.6.3</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:63" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.63</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
